backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a greeting storage system with functions to create, retrieve, and list birthday greetings stored in a Map by linkId.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including sender form, link generation, recipient view with cake/candles, blow detection, and birthday message display with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a festive color palette using OKLCH color system for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Birthday Greeting App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for sender form (/) and recipient view (/greeting/:linkId), includes Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/BirthdayCake.tsx: Component rendering a birthday cake image with three centered candles that toggle between lit and extinguished states with animated flame effects.
Component displaying personalized birthday message with recipient name, custom message, confetti animation, decorative icons, and Caffeine.ai footer attribution.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiAnimatio: Component generating 50 animated confetti pieces with randomized positions, delays, durations, and rotations for celebratory effect.
frontend/src/components/LinkDisplay.tsx: Component displaying the generated shareable link with copy-to-clipboard functionality, sharing instructions, and option to create another greeting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlowDetection.ts: Custom React hook that uses the Web Audio API to detect blowing sounds through the microphone by analyzing low-mid frequency amplitude, triggering a state change when a blow is detected above a threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for creating and fetching birthday greetings from the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom party-themed color palette using OKLCH color space, including festive warm colors, flame gradients, and dark mode variants for a birthday celebration UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/RecipientView.tsx: Birthday greeting recipient page that displays a cake with candles, uses blow detection to trigger candle extinguishing animation, and reveals the birthday message after successful blow detection.
frontend/src/pages/SenderForm.tsx: Form page for creating birthday greetings where users input recipient name and message, generates a unique link ID, and displays the shareable link with confetti animation upon successful creation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Poppins, Fredoka), container settings, border radius variables, accordion animations, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a birthday greeting app with features for creating personalized wishes via shareable links, candle-blowing interaction, and festive UI; includes existing features, architectural notes, and image requirements for cake and candle assets.
